description:
Welcome to our Rome travel vlog where we take you on a journey to discover the hidden gems of this beautiful city. From secret alleyways to breathtaking views, we'll show you the best places to visit in Rome that are off the beaten track. Not only will you get to experience the authentic side of Rome, but we'll also be sharing some valuable money-saving tips that will help you stick to your budget while still having an amazing time. Whether you're a first-time traveler or a seasoned adventurer, this travel vlog is perfect for anyone looking to explore Rome like a local. So, sit back, relax, and let's embark on a journey to discover the hidden gems of Rome together!

Thank you for all of your love and support! Don't forget to subscribe and turn on the bell so you never miss a new video! You can also follow us on our other socials below! Ciao for now! -Jessi and Alessio
